title: pristimera bojeri
intro: Pristimera bojeri, also known as the red flower tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Celastraceae. It is native to the island of Mauritius and is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been used to treat a variety of health issues. The plant has been used to treat conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, and its extracts have also been found to have antioxidant and antimicrobial properties. Pristimera bojeri can be prepared as a herbal tea or tincture, and its leaves and flowers can be used to make a topical cream or ointment for wound healing and skin care.
